title: NPCI UPI OC 115D Addendum to Numeric UPI ID Mapper on Revised Timeline
text:
N=CI»

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCI/UPI/OC-115D/2022 (Addendum D) 29" July 2022

To,
UPI Member Banks, PSPs and Third Party App Providers
Madam / Sir,

Subject: Addendum to circular NPCI/UPI/OC-115/2021-22 on revised timeline

NPCI had introduced UPI ID Mapper vide NPCI/UPI/OC-115/2021-2022 dated 20" July 2021 with
subject- Rollout of ‘Numeric UP! ID Mapper’ to enable ‘UP! Number’ with the aim to accelerate
adoption of feature phone based UPI solutions and bring interoperability in mobile number based
UPI payments. Pilot phase was planned for eco-system from 1% Oct, 2021 to 18 Dec, 2021 with
maximum of 5 million seeding per app. Further, timelines for pilot was extended to expand the
coverage (details in addendums NPCI/UPHVOC-115B/2021-2022 dated 9" Dec 2021 and
NPCI/UPI/OC-115C/2021-2022 dated 28"" Feb 2022). Thereafter, Pilot was successfully executed
by 15" May 2022 with 12 million users seeded on the mapper.

Subsequently, for scaling up users on UPI ID Mapper, PSPs/TPAPs started onboarding 25 million
users per App from 16" May 2022 (ref circular NPCI/UPI/OC-115C/2021-2022). As on date, 85
million users have been seeded on mapper and daily one lakh transactions are being routed via
UPI ID Mapper. In this scale up phase, eco system performance has been monitored regularly
and in consultation with the stakeholders, following timelines have been drawn.

Launch Plan Description Timeline

During this period, participating PSPs/TPAPs

The PSP / TPAP shall decline mobile number
based UPI transactions if the sender / receiver ist Nov 2022
has not provided the consent for seeding on the onward

mapper

Members may also note following:

1. PSPs/TPAPs not live on mapper are advised to go live at earliest and live members should

register their users as per above timeline

2. Itis reiterated that for all UPI Number transactions, PSPs should pass payee UPI Number

(CMid) in financial transaction, in addition to existing parameters.

3. Members to ensure that UPI transactions using the UP] Number are in appropriate

proportion to the users seeded on mapper.

However, above has no impact on UPI id based transactions in the UPI system (not using mobile

numbers for UPI based transfers).

Members are requested to take note of above timelines for compliance.

SD/-

Yours faithfully,
Kunal Kalawatia
